sourcesContent:
import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Router } from '@angular/router'; import { AuthService } from '../../services/auth.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-landing', templateUrl: './landing.component.html', styleUrls: ['./landing.component.css'] }) export class LandingComponent { constructor(private router: Router, private authService: AuthService) { if (this.authService.isLoggedIn()) { this.router.navigate(['/dashboard']); } } navigateToLogin() { this.router.navigate(['/login']); } navigateToRegister() { this.router.navigate(['/register']); } }

Hostel Management System

Streamline your hostel operations with our comprehensive management solution

Features

🏠

Room Management

Efficiently manage rooms, track availability, and assign students

👥

Student Management

Maintain student profiles, track attendance, and manage allotments

📝

Request Management

Handle complaints, leave requests, and room transfers efficiently

🔧

Maintenance Tracking

Report and track maintenance issues in real-time

📊

Dashboard Analytics

Get insights with comprehensive statistics and reports

🔐

Role-Based Access

Secure access control for Admin, Warden, and Student roles
